overview.name: SendGrid Condition Execution Control Test
overview.description:
This scenario verifies condition-based execution control for SendGrid requests.
Test flow: 1. Execute request with TRUE condition → request should be sent and return 202. 2. Execute request with FALSE condition → request should NOT be executed.
Additional validation: - Second request contains invalid payload to ensure failure if condition is ignored.

sendgrid.comment: Request should be executed because condition is TRUE
Request should NOT be executed because condition is FALSE
